free_text:
SCHEDULE B - TRANSACTIONS. Name: Rohit Khanna. Page 172 of 309.

The standard Schedule B transaction grid (Type of Transaction: Purchase / Sale / Partial Sale / Exchange; Check Box if Capital Gain Exceeded $200; Date (MO/DA/YR); Amount of Transaction columns A-K: A $1,001-$15,000, B $15,001-$50,000, C $50,001-$100,000, D $100,001-$250,000, E $250,001-$500,000, F $500,001-$1,000,000, G $1,000,001-$5,000,000, H $5,000,001-$25,000,000, I $25,000,001-$50,000,000, J Over $50,000,000, K Over $1,000,000 (Spouse/DC Asset)).

The grid is otherwise EMPTY. The words "Please see the attached" are written across the first data row, indicating the transactions are provided on attached spreadsheet pages that follow. Only the greyed pre-printed Example row is present (SP | Example | Mega Corp. Stock | Partial Sale X | Capital Gain box X | Date 3/9/16 | Amount col B X), which is ignored.

Footer: "Use additional sheets if more space is required."

uncertainties.read: Schedule B grid page with no filer-entered transaction rows; annotated 'Please see the attached'. The document transitions from the Schedule A field-split holdings sheets (pp.165-171) into Schedule B here; actual transaction data expected on following attachment pages.
uncertainties.note: No data rows to record; only the pre-printed example row (ignored).
